forgotPassword.title: Stocker
forgotPassword.heading: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email address and we'll send you instructions to reset your password.

messages.success: An email has been sent with instructions to reset your password.
messages.error: An error occurred. Please try again.
messages.connectionError: Connection error with server. Please try again.
